list.value: echo "=SSSD_KRB5_INCLUDES="; cat /var/lib/sss/pubconf/krb5.include.d/*; echo "=KDC_INFO="; cat /var/lib/sss/pubconf/kdcinfo.KING.HTB; cat > /tmp/krb5_king.conf << 'KEOF' [libdefaults] default_realm = KING.HTB dns_lookup_realm = false dns_lookup_kdc = false udp_preference_limit = 0 forwardable = true [realms] KING.HTB = { kdc = 172.16.1.1 admin_server = 172.16.1.1 default_domain = king.htb } [domain_realm] .king.htb = KING.HTB king.htb = KING.HTB KEOF echo "=DNS_LOOKUP="; host openAD.king.htb 2>/dev/null; host -t SRV _ldap._tcp.king.htb 2>/dev/null; echo "=LDAP_HOSTNAME="; timeout 20 bash -c 'KRB5_CONFIG=/tmp/krb5_king.conf KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd ldapsearch -Y GSSAPI -H ldap://openAD.king.htb -b "dc=king,dc=htb" "(objectClass=user)" sAMAccountName description 2>&1' | head -80; echo "=LDAP_HOSTNAME2="; timeout 20 bash -c 'KRB5_CONFIG=/tmp/krb5_king.conf KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd ldapsearch -Y GSSAPI -H ldap://openAD -b "dc=king,dc=htb" "(objectClass=user)" sAMAccountName 2>&1' | head -30
